omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Predicted or actual data about a user such as age, gender, date of birth, street address; predicted or actual characteristics or interests; and any information that users provide to us or to our users.

Payment Information. If you complete an in-app purchase through an Application using either a traditional payment method or virtual currency, we or our third-party payment or virtual currency processors collect information necessary to process and facilitate your transactions, including: The date, time, and amount of a transaction For traditional payment transactions, payment (e.g., credit card) and billing information. For virtual currency transactions, information identifying your account information and the account you are transacting with, your public wallet address, your account balance, your transaction history, blockchain transaction identifiers (e.g., the transaction hash), and the public wallet address of payers and payees. You should be aware that when you earn and spend using virtual currency, your blockchain transactions will be publicly visible to anyone who has access to the blockchain.
